_note: I4 (Inventory Interface Information Injector) supports icon/tag injection only — it cannot add sortable columns. This file is intentionally inert and kept for reference only.
_mechanism: The 'acquiredTime' property is injected into each inventory item's Scaleform GFxValue object via SKSE::ScaleformInterface::Register(RegInvCallback*), triggered when SkyUI calls skse.ExtendData(true). The column is defined in Interface/skyui/config.txt using entry.text = @acquiredTime.
